arts.ttl: 'Really important' - Ruben Amorim fires clear Europa League warning to Manchester United squad

arts.ttl: 'I demanded to leave Man Utd even though they wanted me to stay – I made a big mistake'
arts.sum: Despite Andrei Kanchelskis coming into his own in his last year as a Manchester United player, he famously revealed his desire to leave Old Trafford; a decision he'd come to regret

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford suffers new transfer blow as Barcelona make unlikely move

arts.ttl: Álvaro Carreras and family want to know if Amorim will use clause – Keen on Manchester United move clarity
arts.sum: Álvaro Carreras has gradually found his way since leaving Manchester United for Benfica a year ago. The left-back has a €50m buyout clause, but the Red Devils can sign him by exercising their €20m option – in a summer window – which was agreed in the initial negotiations. arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo ‘insistence’ can see player leave Manchester United – Lobbying for transfer
arts.sum: Earlier this month, journalist Bruno Andrade stated Manchester United’s Casemiro could be on his way to Saudi Arabia in the winter market. Casemiro started against Newcastle United since Manuel Ugarte was serving a suspension, and it was his only league start since December 1st.
